revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA content, refresh translated-page template, tidy interwikis & categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Immanuelle moved page [[Category:伊予市の建築物]] to [[Category:Architecture of Iyo City]]: Merge [[Category:伊予市の建築物]] into [[Category:Architecture of Iyo City]] via bot
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[愛媛県]][[伊予市]]内にある[[建築物]]に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:いよしのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{citation needed|いよしのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:伊予市の建築物|version=61646942}} [[Category:Buildings in Ehime prefecture by municipality]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Iyo, Ehime]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[ja:Category:伊予市の建築物]] [[ko:Category:이요시의 건축물]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Iyo Shrine]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{デフォルトソート:いよしのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} {{citation needed|いよしのけんちくふつ}} {{translated page|ja|Category:伊予市の建築物|version=61646942}} {{wikidata link|Q21058923}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:伊予市の建築物]] [[ko:Category:이요시의 건축물]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Iyo Shrine]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Buildings in Ehime prefecture by municipality]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Iyo, Ehime]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Architecture_of_Iyo_City here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
